how_can_help: How can Dosely help you today?

upload_subtitle: Upload an existing image of the medicine to receive accurate details, usage information, and warnings.
search_subtitle: Search by medicine name or type to view trusted information, instructions, and safety details.
chat_subtitle: Get instant answers about medicines, usage, and safety information to help you take them correctly and confidently.
add_medicine_hint: Add your first medicine from the schedule
health_info_hint: This information helps Dosely provide safer and more accurate medication analysis and health predictions.
forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
password_changed_subtitle: Your password has been changed successfully.
pillo_intro: I'm Pillo, your AI medication assistant.
pillo_safe: ✅ According to your profile, this medicine is safe.
pillo_side: Common side effects: mild nausea. Always check with doctor.
about_us_subtitle: Smart Medication Analysis Using AI and Patient Medical History
our_mission_text: We help patients and healthcare providers avoid medication errors by combining personal health data with AI-powered analysis.
chat_support_subtitle: Get help from our team in real-time
faq_q1: How does Dosely analyze my medications?
faq_a1: We combine your personal health information with up-to-date pharmacological data and AI models to detect potential interactions, contraindications, and safer alternatives.
faq_a2: Yes. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We follow best practices and never sell your personal information.
faq_a3: Yes — go to Settings → Privacy → Request data deletion. Your account and health data will be permanently removed within 30 days.
faq_q4: Why do I need to provide health information?
faq_a4: Providing accurate allergies, conditions and medications allows Dosely to give much more personalized and safer recommendations.
coming_soon: Feature coming soon • We are working on it
logout_subtitle: You will need to sign in again to access your medication analysis and health data.
data_collection_1: We collect personal health information to provide accurate medication analysis.
data_collection_2: Email, username, date of birth, allergies, chronic conditions, current medications.
data_usage_1: Used only for AI-powered medication safety predictions.
your_rights_1: You can request deletion of your data at any time.
report_problem_subtitle: Please describe the issue you are facing. The more details you provide, the faster we can help.
report_submitted: Thank you! Your report has been submitted.
sign_out_all_desc: This will log you out from all devices.
weak_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.
invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
